name: Leon Tremblay
description:
Leon is an older man, with shoulder-length black/blue hair. He has short bangs, and the rest of her hair falling loosely down his shoulders and back, and also wears a headband with dangling beads. His eyes are orange, and she has a small goatee. He appears to be wearing a navy standing collar button-up and jeans underneath a long brown trench coat.
(Copied straight from the wiki ngl)
